name: Chaser
description:
Originally a creation of the Higher Powers to balance the population of both Nevada and Purgatory; he was given a new purpose of chasing down Nevada’s Most Wanted and snuffing out his S-3LF with the hopes of ending Hank’s story once and for all.

Unlike the man he copies, Chaser isn’t motivated by bloodlust or the thrill of combat.

He simply wants to stabilize the amount of S-3LFS flowing into Purgatory caused by Status Quo’s constant clashes with the AAHW, and occasionally Nexus Core.

He’s just tired.

He’s a master of all forms of combat, ranging from hand-to-hand to surpassing anyone’s skill with a blade. Able to amplify(?) any weapons in his hands, as well as summon any weapon he wishes. Teleportation, too. He has his own pocket dimension that he likes to drag his victims into so they can’t call for help, while also being able to summon AAHW units.

Art by Genllo4
creator: NMW
